### Types
- breaking, feat, fix, build, ci, docs, enhancement, chore, perf, style, test, refactor, revert

### Scopes
- app (Next.js UI)
- agent (Eve agent)
- docs (documentation)
- deps (dependencies)

### 📝 Checklist

- [ ] I have linked an issue or discussion.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally.
